subcodes.first_line: O true friend! As far as thou art able, encourage the friends in teaching and instruct them in the distinction between truth and falsehood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی تا توانی تشویق یاران بر تبلیغ نما و تفریق مابین حق و باطل بیاموز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as educator, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
